notes: Normalized intermediate produced from the read-only VideoAsk MCP. One VideoAsk form -> one module; one creator/question video -> one lesson. Fill videoUrl + text from the MCP; muxPlaybackId/muxAssetId/durationSeconds are filled by 1-upload-to-mux.mjs.

lessons.title: Lesson 1 (e.g. the question title)
lessons.text: Transcript / question text -> becomes the lesson 'content' (HTML or plain text).
